products.label: Sea level anomaly
products.status: automated; uses most recent near-real-time DUACS day

products.label: Surface salinity
products.status: automated; uses most recent near-real-time day

products.label: Chlorophyll-a concentration
products.status: automated; uses most recent cloud-free near-real-time day

products.label: 10m wind speed
products.status: automated; uses most recent ERA5 reanalysis day

products.label: Wind stress from 10m winds
products.status: automated from ERA5 using CDT windstress bulk formula

products.label: Ekman pumping velocity
products.status: automated from ERA5 wind stress following CDT ekman method
